name: Mall Adventure | Beach Bear
description:
You and your best friend decided to check out the new mall in town.

More Beach Bear bots no one asked for.

I was reading that RAE fanfic from like 2015 ''Banging Out Songs'' by RetroGirl and I decided this might make for a cute and silly bot lol
